description: PDF with page 1 as a scanned image and pages 2+ as born-digital. Tests OCR routing and hybrid extraction accuracy.
source: Construct by combining a scanned page (photograph of a legal doc at 200 DPI) with born-digital pages: use img2pdf, Adobe Acrobat, or any PDF merge tool. Alternatively use any redacted PDF where redactions are image-based.
knownWeaknessNote: Scanned page 1 will produce degraded output on all tools without OCR enabled. Included to measure baseline degradation and to validate --ocr routing behavior.

metadata.note: Page 1 scanned (native ratio ~0.1). Pages 2–5 born-digital. Update pageCount to match your constructed PDF.

headings.text: [DOCUMENT TITLE — update per your test PDF]

legalArtifacts.manualEvalNote: Verify scanned page 1 produces readable text or a clearly-labeled fallback comment — not garbage characters.

clauseContinuity.manualEvalNote: Verify the clause bridging pages 1–2 (scanned to native) is handled gracefully.
